MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Healy is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Arland Bernadino is present.
Attorney Olivia Jenq representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Quidachay and litigants confer in chambers.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
